chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.S-182 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.2308/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. No.2309/2025 4. For hearing of main case 03.09.2025 Mr. Wishan Das Kolhi, Advocate for petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. At the very outset learned Counsel for petitioner submits that for redressal of the grievance of petitioner he will approach the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace and under instructions does not press this petition along with pending application. Ordered accordingly, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, if desired so. JUDGE Ali Haider
